data.HEADLINE: Run these 5 checks
data.BULLET_1: Open deals with no next step set
data.BULLET_2: Leads assigned to people who left
data.BULLET_4: Deals stuck in one stage over 30 days
data.BULLET_5: Won deals with no renewal date on file

data.STAT_LABEL: average we find in the first audit

data.HEADLINE: Fix in this order
data.BULLET_1: Stuck deals first, revenue already on the table
data.BULLET_2: Unassigned leads next, capacity already paid for
data.BULLET_3: Missing contacts third, hygiene compounds later
data.BULLET_4: Stage definitions fourth, stops leaks returning
data.BULLET_5: Weekly 15-min review last, keeps it all alive

data.HEADLINE: What makes it stick
data.BULLET_1: A saved view per check, not a new report
data.BULLET_2: One named owner for each pipeline stage
data.BULLET_4: One Slack channel for revenue alerts only
data.BULLET_5: Screenshots in the channel when a fix lands
